inbox_payload_outputs.attachments: operator summary + full summary + optional cycle report

decisions: the inbox payload is derived from the operator report so automation handoff stays downstream of the stable supervisor contract
attachments are explicit paths instead of inline evidence duplication to keep payloads compact and auditable
publishing is intentionally out of scope so the payload can be validated locally without network side effects

follow_up_candidates.title: autonomous schedule/report runner from inbox payload
follow_up_candidates.reason: the payload is now ready, so the next step is a local automation wrapper that reads it and emits a final operator-facing run report
